description: The SubmeshCharacterController is a component able to change properties of a Person or NPC locomotion (Character Controller) walking on a mesh based on what submesh of the mesh they are walking on.

fields.Values: What value to use when modifying for each sub mesh. In order of submesh number.

usage: Attach to the same slot as a mesh collider with a mesh set to static and IsCharacterCollider in order for this to work.
